scenario.title: Similar loops from fleet shown in loop proposal card
steps: App loads with mock data showing loop proposal cards
Similar loops section appears when a loop proposal is rendered
User can expand the similar loops section to see matches from other instances
User can click 'Use as starting point' to pre-fill the proposal

assertions.description: App loads without errors in mock mode
LoopProposalCard renders with similar loops section
Fleet similarity computation produces matches from mock data

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence

### Similar loops from fleet shown in loop proposal card

> Screenshot could not be captured in this headless environment. See unit tests (21 passing) for behavioral verification.

**Scenario:** When a loop proposal card appears in chat (e.g., the agent proposes creating a loop via MCP `create_loop`), the card now shows a collapsible **"Similar loops"** section listing matching loops from other reachable instances. The user can expand this section to see the instance name, project, command, interval, and match reasons for each similar loop, then click **"Use as starting point"** to pre-fill the proposal's command and interval fields.

**Key changes:**
- New `fleet-similarity.ts` module with pure similarity scoring (command match 0.50, interval 0.20, project 0.15, description 0.15)
- `LoopProposalCard` extended with `similarLoops` prop and collapsible UI section
- `SessionChatView` computes similar loops from fleet data and passes to card
- `App.tsx` passes fleet reachability and projects data to `SessionChatView`
- 21 Vitest unit tests for similarity functions (all passing)

**Acceptance criteria met:**
- ✅ During creation, the agent fetches loops from other reachable instances and identifies similar ones (similarity judged by command/interval/project scoring)
- ✅ Matches inform the proposal via the "Use as starting point" action which pre-fills command and interval
- ✅ No local storage required in this issue (similarity is computed transiently on component render)
